title: ApiKeyMiddleware safety hardening with explicit AllowUnauthenticatedApi flag
description:
Add `Agent:AllowUnauthenticatedApi` bool configuration option (default false). When false AND `Agent:ApiKey` is missing/empty, block all `/api/*` requests with 401. When true, preserve existing dev-convenience pass-through. Emit `LogWarning` on startup whenever auth is disabled (either via explicit flag or missing key). Keep backward compatibility for local dev.

Files: `WebUI.Blazor/ApiKeyMiddleware.cs`, `WebUI.Blazor/appsettings*.json`

Evidence: deep-dive audit Finding #5 — auth can be disabled by configuration omission. This is a P1 deployment safety fix.

**Note:** Auto-generated key TSK-0101 conflicts with existing Sprint 46 Wave A task. Correct key is **TSK-0110**.
